lt.line: Tuo bus pašlovintas mano Tėvas, kad jūs duosite gausių vaisių ir būsite mano mokiniai“.

en.event: Thursday of the Sixteenth Week in Ordinary Time
en.line: Amen, I say to you, many prophets and righteous people longed to see what you see but did not see it, and to hear what you hear but did not hear it.
